# 联影智能 · Agent Hub / United Imaging Intelligence · Agent Hub

> 把院内影像 AI 变成人和智能体都能直接调用的标准服务。本文件为机器可读的能力目录摘要。
> Turn in-house imaging AI into services people and agents can call. Machine-readable catalog summary.

## Capabilities

- **uAI Easy Triage ICH** [clinical-ai/CT] — FDA K242292 (2024-09-24): Analyzes non-contrast head CT to detect suspected intracranial hemorrhage (ICH) and flag worklist prioritization for triage. MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/ich-triage
- **uAI EasyTriage-Rib** [clinical-ai/CT] — FDA K193271 (2021-01-15): Detects rib fractures on chest CT and assigns prioritization to assist reading order. MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/rib-triage
- **uAI Portal** [platform/Cross] — FDA K240411 (2024-09-06): Automated radiological image processing and an AI application hosting platform. MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/portal
- **uOmnispace.CT** [platform/CT] — FDA K233209 (2024-05-17): AI post-processing and advanced visualization software for CT. MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/omnispace-ct
- **uOmnispace.MR** [platform/MR] — FDA K233186 (2024-04-17): AI post-processing and advanced visualization software for MR (see also K253077). MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/omnispace-mr
- **HYPER DLR** [reconstruction/PET] — FDA K193210 (2020-08-04): Uses a pretrained neural network to reduce FDG-PET noise and improve SNR (cleared within the imaging system). MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/hyper-dlr
- **Deep Recon** [reconstruction/CT] — FDA K193073 (2020-07-06): Deep-learning reconstruction for CT that improves image quality (cleared within the imaging system). MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/deep-recon
- **HYPER AiR** [reconstruction/MR] — FDA K210001 (2021-04-30): Deep-learning acceleration and reconstruction for MR (cleared within the imaging system). MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/hyper-air
- **HYPER Focus** [reconstruction/Cross] — FDA K210418 (2021-04-09): Deep-learning reconstruction that improves image quality (cleared within the imaging system). MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/hyper-focus
- **vitallens-rppg** [skill/Cross] — demo (not a device): Contactless ~12s webcam capture returning heart rate and respiratory rate. Research/demo only, not a medical device. MCP: mcp://hub.uii-ai.example/vitallens
